questions.prompt: Which pseudo-class matches an element that the user hovers over?
questions.explanation: :hover activates while the pointer is over the element.
:first-child overrides li because it's more specific and also last-in-source for that element.

questions.prompt: How many colons for a pseudo-ELEMENT like ::before?
questions.explanation: Modern syntax: pseudo-classes use one colon, pseudo-elements use two.

questions.prompt: Add a little '★' before every <li>. Use ::before.
questions.broken:
/* add content before each li */
li { padding-left: 4px; }
questions.hint: li::before { content: "★ "; } — the content property is required.
questions.explanation: ::before generates a pseudo-element; content is required for it to render.
